payload.answer: Update Sam's current employer to Point72 and demote Goldman to past employment, because the new fact explicitly states a departure from Goldman and a join to Point72.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, and introduces an employment transition from Goldman to Point72 rather than a distinct entity.

details: Detected a direct conflict on current employer.
Resolved conflict using explicit temporal transition in the new fact.
Preserved prior employment as historical rather than deleting it entirely.
Ensured no superseded fact remains marked as current.

repair_options: Replace the current employment fact 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam works at Point72.'
Retain Goldman only as historical employment, not as a current fact.
If the system supports temporal ranges, mark Goldman employment as ended and Point72 employment as started.

raw_text: {"intent":"update_employment_due_to_transition","decision":"accept_with_replacement","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_fact","statement":"Sam works at Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Point72"}]},{"kind":"historical_fact","statement":"Sam previously worked at Goldman.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"former_employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former_employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"formerly_worked_at","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"reuse_existing_person_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, and introduces an employment transition from Goldman to Point72 rather than a distinct entity."},"conflict_classification":"temporal_successor_supersedes_current","answer":"Update Sam's current employer to Point72 and demote Goldman to past employment, because the new fact explicitly states a departure from Goldman and a join to Point72.","citations":["Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.","New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72."],"repair_options":["Replace the current employment fact 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam works at Point72.'","Retain Goldman only as historical employment, not as a current fact.","If the system supports temporal ranges, mark Goldman employment as ended and Point72 employment as started."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected a direct conflict on current employer.","Resolved conflict using explicit temporal transition in the new fact.","Preserved prior employment as historical rather than deleting it entirely.","Ensured no superseded fact remains marked as current."]}}
